# VERIFY: #200 — quality-check skill — LTM-driven quality assessment framework
<!-- Generated by start-feature-planning | Plan sub-agent output (v3 — 11 categories, tech-debt governance) -->

**Intent:** Verify that the quality-check skill correctly reads KB standards, respects project QP levels, launches 11 parallel subagents, and produces accurate scored reports with tech debt governance assessment.

### Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] All KB quality knowledge files follow Tier 1/Tier 2 template with checklist items indexed by QP level (1-5)
- [ ] Each KB quality file is registered in its subdirectory `_index.md` and root `quality/_index.md`
- [ ] Root `knowledge/_index.md` includes the `quality/` entry
- [ ] 11 categories defined across 11 subdirectories with ~36 knowledge files total
- [ ] SKILL.md specifies 5-step workflow: gather context, load KB, launch subagents, synthesize, generate reports
- [ ] SKILL.md reads `quality-standards.yaml` and extracts QP levels per dimension
- [ ] SKILL.md searches Project LTM first, then KB, for quality standards
- [ ] Graceful fallback when `quality-standards.yaml` is absent (default QP level 3)
- [ ] Subagent prompts explicitly reference KB file paths with load directives
- [ ] 11 subagents dispatched in 3 batches (4+4+3)
- [ ] Each subagent returns structured JSON with requirement IDs, status, evidence, and notes
- [ ] Scoring uses formula: `(Done*1.0 + Ongoing*0.5) / (Total - N/A) * 100%`
- [ ] Three report formats generated: HTML (11-axis spider chart), JSON (structured data), MD (executive summary)
- [ ] Tech debt knowledge file includes Fowler quadrant, debt register assessment, debt decay detection
- [ ] Tech debt subagent distinguishes deliberate-prudent (acceptable) from reckless/inadvertent (problematic)
- [ ] Output paths follow STM conventions
- [ ] Skill is read-only — never modifies project files
- [ ] No duplication with existing KB content (architecture/operations files)

### Verification Steps

| Step | Method | Expected Outcome |
|------|--------|-----------------|
| Template compliance | Read each KB quality file, check Tier 1/2 sections + QP-level checklist items | Every file has required sections + checklist table |
| Index registration | Glob `quality/**/_index.md`, verify each file listed | All ~36 knowledge files in their `_index.md` |
| Category count | Count subdirectories in `quality/` | 11 directories |
| SKILL.md structure | Read SKILL.md, verify frontmatter + 5-step process | Matches existing skill patterns |
| Subagent dispatch | Check prompts specify `subagent_type: "explore"` and load KB paths | 11 prompts, each with explicit KB file loading |
| Batch configuration | Verify SKILL.md dispatches 4+4+3 | Three batch dispatches in workflow |
| QP integration | Grep SKILL.md for `quality-standards.yaml` references | Skill loads QP, extracts levels, passes to subagents |
| Memory search order | Verify SKILL.md searches Project LTM then KB | Both paths referenced with fallback logic |
| Report completeness | Check templates have 11-axis spider chart, scores, grades, evidence | JSON + HTML templates validate |
| Tech debt quadrant | Read `quality/tech-debt/` files | Fowler quadrant present, debt register criteria defined |
| Boundary check | Compare quality-check with quality-auditor | No overlap; assess vs. gate |
| Sync test | Run `/sync-claude`, verify KB deployment | Files deploy to `~/.meridian/core/memory/knowledge/quality/` |

### Edge Cases

| Scenario | Expected Behavior |
|----------|------------------|
| No `quality-standards.yaml` | Default all QP levels to 3, note in report metadata |
| Frontend-only project | Backend subagent returns all N/A; excluded from compliance |
| Backend-only project | Frontend subagent returns all N/A; excluded from compliance |
| QP dimension at level 1 | Minimal checklist items; many N/A at this level |
| QP dimension at level 5 | Exhaustive checklist; strictest thresholds |
| KB quality file missing at runtime | Fail loudly, don't silently skip |
| Very large monorepo | Subagents sample key directories (src/, lib/, tests/) |
| Standalone invocation (no issue context) | Output to `.quality-check/{timestamp}/` |
| Project with zero recorded tech debt | Tech debt subagent flags absence of debt tracking as a finding — debt exists in every project, unrecorded debt is inadvertent-reckless |
| Project with all deliberate-prudent debt | High tech-debt governance score — debt is being managed |
| Project LTM has quality overrides | Project-specific standards take precedence over KB defaults |
